name: Leandro Szikora
headline: Data platforms, end to end.
tagline: Seven years across the whole data stack — from IoT pipelines and NoSQL systems in Buenos Aires to enterprise lakehouses and data governance in Barcelona. Next chapter: Staff ML Engineer at Factorial.
about: I'm an Information Systems Engineer (UTN FRBA) who fell in love with data and cloud systems early and never looked back. What I enjoy most is making decisions: weighing the trade-offs, taking the calculated risk, and owning the outcome.

I learn fast and adapt faster — a skill sharpened by working in multicultural teams across Argentina and Spain. Today I lead a team of four data engineers, and I've had the chance to drive migrations and platform projects that touched most of the companies I've worked for.
human: Off the clock: fútbol 🇦🇷, mate and coffee (no need to choose), collecting manga and perfumes, exploring every city I visit on foot — and volunteering at a cat shelter, where my two cats fully approve of my career choices.

recommendation.quote: His data pipelines and tools knowledge and his great ability to learn fast… was decisive for the success of the project.
recommendation.author: Oscar Pulido
